content: Check whether this session adds a new durable record or just refines an old one.
I will keep only the durable rule and ignore the patch details.
Earlier we already had a record about retry budget living in job metadata. This session is different.
The new issue is restart recovery after lease handoff.
Durable decision: authoritative lease ownership must live in the persisted queue row so restart and failover can recover it. Local rename and debug-print cleanup were just implementation noise.
Understood. The durable point is queue-row lease ownership, not retry budget wording.
